author: Agentage
description: Visualize your vault as a 3D, rotating force-graph: notes are nodes, links are edges. Search, filter, and orbit your knowledge graph from the toolbar. Part of Agentage. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: agentage
manifest.description: Fly through your vault as a cinematic 3D force-graph: notes are nodes, links are edges, folders are colored clusters. Search, filter, and orbit your knowledge from the toolbar.
manifest.name: Agentage Galaxy

name: Agentage Galaxy

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Agentage Galaxy 0.2.0** - see your Obsidian vault as a 3D, rotating force-graph.

### Install (manual)
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` below into
`<your-vault>/.obsidian/plugins/agentage-galaxy/`, then enable
**Agentage Galaxy** under Settings → Community plugins.

### Install (BRAT)
Add `agentage/obsidian-galaxy` in the BRAT plugin.

See the [README](https://github.com/agentage/obsidian-galaxy#readme) for details.
